_description: This file shows the required data format. Copy it to data/transactions.csv (CSV format) to use your own data.

columnDetails.date: Required. Format: YYYY-MM-DD (also accepts DD/MM/YYYY and DD.MM.YY)
columnDetails.category: Optional. If empty, falls back to auto-inference rules in app.config.js

budgetFormat.description: JSON object mapping category names to monthly budget limits (numbers). Omit a category to show no limit.

orEnvironmentVariables.APP_NAME: Display name shown in browser tab and sidebar (default: BudgetLite)
